info.title: Project Rest Services
info.description: Rest Services for managing the Project modeler.

get.summary: Get the folders for a given project id.

post.summary: Create the folders for a given project id.

put.summary: Update the folders for a given project id.

get.summary: Search Projects using the provided input string.

parameters.name: searchStr
parameters.description: Search Criteria; 2 or more characters required.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of objects to return; default 50; max 1000

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: The number of objects to skip in case of paginating through the serach results; default 0

get.summary: Get the issue details for a given project & issue id.
Get the latest Assessment for a given Project.

parameters.name: allAssessments
parameters.description: Optionally retrieve all Assessments for the Project. (Default: false)

post.summary: Create an Assessment for a given Project.

put.summary: Update the Assessments for a given Project.

get.summary: Get the risks associated directly to a given project.
Get the risk details for a given project & risk id.
Get the information for a given Assessment.

put.summary: Update an Assessment for a given Project.

delete.summary: Delete an Assessment for a given Project.

get.summary: Get a specific Project detail and related data.
Get Project Issues for a given project.

delete.summary: Delete a given folder based on the given project & folder id.

get.summary: Get the projects for a given program id
Get the information for a given folder object associated with any project.

title.description: Title information if used, otherwise the object name.

revision.description: (unique discriminator only, Projects and Tasks are not revisioned)

originated.description: The creation date of the object.

modified.description: Date of last modification to any object information.

modifyAccess.description: Whether the user has modify access to the Project.

deleteAccess.description: Whether the user has delete access to the Project.

project.description: Collaborative Space (project) the Project was created in.

percentCompleteBasedOn.description: This attribute stores the value of parameter based on which the percent complete is calculated

constraintType.description: Reflects ASAP or ALAP depending on schedule from.

projectVisibility.description: A non-controlling identification of the desired Project access.

PALId.description: The Project Access List object (used for some navigation)

sequenceOrder.description: the task sequence id within a project.

originated.description: The originated date of the task.

notes.description: Additional notes associated to the task

routeTaskInstructions.description: Route Task Instructions for route-based tasks.

taskWBS.description: the task WBS within a project.

identifier.description: The unique object identifier when an object is represented by a Public URI.

csrf.description: CSRF object is required to be sent back for update operations and typically provided with read operations.

success.description: The response data when the request succeeds with 200 status code.
Reflects true to indicate successful request.

error-400.description: The response data when the request fails with 400 or 500 error.

error.description: An NLS error message.  In the case of a 400 error, the message is precise.  In the case of 500 error, the message is generic.

internalError.description: The technical reason of the failure - usually associated with a 500 error; this is not an NLS message and reflects the MQL or runtime exception.

internalError.description: The technical reason of the failure - usually associated with a 500 error; this is not an NLS message and reflects the MQL or runtime exception.

Accept-Language.description: Identifies the locale for the web request.

ENO_CSRF_TOKEN.description: The ENOVIA CSRF token which is typically required for update oerations.

include.name: $include
include.description: Identify sub-resources that should be returned by the web request.

fields.name: $fields
fields.description: Identify resource and sub-resource fields that should be returned by the web request.
